mapper.sql:
AA.MESSAGE_SEQ , AA.SENDER , AA.RECEIVER , AA.CONTENT , AA.STATE , AA.REF_CODE , AA.REF_SEQ
, AA.BLOCK_YN , AA.RGT_DTTM
mapper.insert:
/* com.erns.coching.message.mapper.MessageDAO.insert */
SELECT nextval('seq_t_message_inf')
INSERT INTO T_MESSAGE_INF ( MESSAGE_SEQ , SENDER , RECEIVER , CONTENT , STATE
, REF_CODE , REF_SEQ
, SENDER_DEL_YN , RECEIVER_DEL_YN , BLOCK_YN , RGT_DTTM
) VALUES ( #{messageSeq , jdbcType=INTEGER} , #{sender , jdbcType=INTEGER} , #{receiver , jdbcType=INTEGER} , #{content , jdbcType=VARCHAR} , '0'
, #{refCode , jdbcType=VARCHAR} , COALESCE(#{refCode, jdbcType=INTEGER}, 0)
, 'N' , 'N' , COALESCE(#{blockYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'N') , now() )
